text.title: Jira via Atlassian Rovo MCP, Permission-Inheriting Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the tracker-jira-rovo-mcp-agents methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: install-rovo-mcp
step.action: Stand up the Rovo Remote MCP server; publish URL + auth domain.

step.name: register-ai-clients
step.action: Register Claude / Cursor / Codex through the MCP OAuth handshake.

step.name: scope-projects
step.action: Configure scope_projects to the projects the inviting user can access.

step.name: enable-native-audit
step.action: Turn on native audit-event writes; pipe to SIEM if available.

step.name: monitor-bypass-attempts
step.action: Watch for direct REST calls from AI client IPs; block at perimeter.
